summary: Promoted the refreshed interactive ops portal journey bundle into canonical mainline truth as repository version `0.177.146` and platform version `0.130.92` from the latest realistic `origin/main` baseline `0.177.145 / 0.130.91`, carrying ADR 0308 journey-aware entry routing and saved-home selection, preserving the ADR 0310 activation baseline, carrying ADR 0312 shared notification center and activity timeline, and repairing the missing Docker bridge-chain recovery exposed by the first exact-main replay.

verification.observed: `scripts/release_manager.py status --json` confirmed the latest-main baseline at `0.177.145 / 0.130.91`, `--dry-run --bump patch` resolved repository version `0.177.146`, and the final release write updated the protected repo surfaces without invoking the external Outline sync because `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1` was set for this exact-main closeout.

verification.check: Focused interactive ops portal regression slice
verification.observed: The final focused pytest slice passed from the exact integration worktree with `60 passed`, covering the portal runtime, playbook, runtime-role, scoped execution, and guest-firewall guardrails that share this live-apply path.

The first refreshed replay failed closed because the Docker `nat` `DOCKER` chain remained missing after guest firewall evaluation; after the bridge-chain recovery repair landed in source commit `36e7636153e2decc324aee8d2c08bdd3d45580ae`, the final replay completed successfully with recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=198 changed=11 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=36 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

verification.check: Guest-local journey, activation, and attention contract
verification.observed: Guest-local verification confirmed `/health`, the neutral `Journey-Aware Start Surface`, the `First-Run Activation` partial, the shared `Notification Center` partial, the shared launcher/search partial, the dashboard attention shell, and the saved-home pin, redirect, and clear flow from inside `docker-runtime-lv3`.

The public `https://ops.example.com/entry` edge returned `HTTP/2 302` with `location: https://ops.example.com/oauth2/sign_in?rd=https://ops.example.com/entry`, preserving the unauthenticated oauth2-proxy gate.

verification.check: Governed backup and evidence refresh after the platform-version bump
verification.observed: After promoting platform version `0.130.92`, the successful replay refreshed the governed restic config-backup receipt `receipts/restic-backups/20260402T154404Z.json`, synced `receipts/restic-snapshots-latest.json`, and regenerated the host SBOM at `receipts/sbom/host-docker-runtime-lv3-2026-04-02.cdx.json`.

verification.check: Exact-main repository automation and validation bundle
verification.observed: The final exact-main tree passed `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces`, `make validate`, `make remote-validate`, `make pre-push-gate`, and `git diff --check` after refreshing the ADR index, generated status surfaces, platform vars, and the dependency-graph markdown from the same integration branch prepared for merge to `main`.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main record for the merged portal bundle that carried ADR 0308 and ADR 0312 on top of the ADR 0310 activation baseline through the same governed production replay.
The successful replay refreshed the governed restic config-backup receipt and the host SBOM alongside the portal deployment.
The final repository automation and validation bundle passed from the same `0.177.146 / 0.130.92` tree that is prepared for merge to `main`.

correction_loop.surface: exact-main interactive ops portal live apply
correction_loop.repair_action: When the first refreshed exact-main replay failed because the Docker `nat` `DOCKER` chain stayed missing after guest firewall evaluation, added the bridge-chain recovery repair on source commit `36e7636153e2decc324aee8d2c08bdd3d45580ae` and reran the governed production replay from the same integration worktree.
